entries.d:
It refers to [XD], which is supposed to be a new [lol], but it is a lot funnier. It means: X(Fucking)D.
> Bob tripped up, and landed in a pile of cow manure face first.
> Me: XFD

entries.t: [计] 传输, 传递, 转移
[医] X病(原因未知病,牲畜皮肤角化症,黄曲霉中毒)

entries.d:
A new IM client that allows users to see which games their buddies are playing. Certain games allow instant joining into your friends' games. Now generally considered AIM for gamers.\r
\r
www.xfire.com
> Because I use Xfire, now I can see which games my friends are playing.
